name: Eastern Illinois University McAfee Gym
description: Eastern Illinois University McAfee Gym is a place to play pickleball in Charleston, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: EIU Pickleball Courts
description: EIU Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Charleston, IL. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Lawson Park
description: Lawson Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mattoon, IL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Mattoon Area Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Mattoon Area Family YMCA in Mattoon, IL! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Peterson Park
description: Peterson Park is a place to play pickleball in Mattoon, IL. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.
